title: "Is Between" Filter for Numbers Widget when filtering a Timeline column

posts.author: Chana (Chana)
posts.cookedHtml:
When I want to use the dashboard “numbers” widget, I am not able to use the advanced filters the show a number only if it “is between” the start and end of a Timeline column.

This would be extremely helpful where I am tracking agreements that cover a certain period of time. The problem with using “start” and “end” limiters for this, is that sometimes an agreement stretched over multiple months.

Ideally I’d like to be able to gather a number from a column based on if the agreement’s timeline falls within a certain month - not just if the agreement starts or ends in a given month.
